title:
Your garment is ready
in 48 hours.
body:
No stepping out. No waiting.
We come to your home, take careful measurements, and deliver something made only for you

title:
See it on Pinterest.
Wear it by Thursday.
body:
Save it, screenshot it, or pin it — we will craft it just for you.
Because ‘I wish I could wear that’ should never go to waste.

title:
Not sure what you want?
That is exactly where we begin.
body: Your personal KAARIQ tailor comes home with design ideas and honest advice — helping you find what always felt right for you.

title:
Made to fit you perfectly.
Free Alterations.
body:
We do not stop until it fits the way it was always meant to.
If it is not perfect, we come back.

title:
You dreamed it.
We craft every detail of it.
body:
Embroidery, lacework, and hand detailing — whatever your vision carries, we bring it to life exactly as you imagined.
Nothing less.

title:
A man's wardrobe should be
built around him.
body:
Not the other way around.
Kurtas, shirts, and trousers — measured at your home, crafted to your body, and delivered in 48 hours.
